name: Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972
officialCitation: The Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972 (Act No. 39 of 1972), repealed and saved under section 164 of the Code on Social Security, 2020.
overview: Historical central labour-law record governing gratuity before the Code on Social Security, 2020 became operative on 21 November 2025. The Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972 was repealed under section 164 of the Code, subject to repeal-and-savings provisions. Current gratuity obligations must be assessed under Chapter V of the Code on Social Security, 2020 and the applicable Central, State or Union Territory rules and notifications. This record is retained for historical periods, saved notifications and rules, accrued rights, pending claims and proceedings, prior exemptions and audit traceability.

authority.name: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India

definitions.definition: An employee covered under the Payment of Gratuity Act.
Continuous service as defined under the Act.
The establishment responsible for gratuity compliance.

rules.title: Review Gratuity Applicability
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment is covered under the Payment of Gratuity Act.

rules.title: Maintain Employee Service Records
rules.description: Maintain accurate employee service records to determine gratuity eligibility.

rules.title: Calculate Gratuity
rules.description: Calculate gratuity payable in accordance with statutory provisions.

rules.title: Pay Eligible Gratuity
rules.description: Ensure gratuity is paid to eligible employees within the prescribed timelines.

exceptions.title: Qualifying Service
exceptions.description: Eligibility is subject to qualifying service and other statutory provisions.

exceptions.title: Repeal and Savings
exceptions.description: Rules, notifications, exemptions, accrued rights, claims, proceedings and actions under the repealed Act continue only to the extent preserved by section 164 of the Code on Social Security, 2020 and the General Clauses Act, 1897.

recommendations.title: Retain Historical Gratuity Records
recommendations.description: Preserve service, nomination, calculation, notice, payment, exemption, insurance, claim and proceeding records created under the repealed Act for saved liabilities and audit traceability.

recommendations.title: Use the Social Security Code Record for Current Compliance
recommendations.description: Assess gratuity arising on or after 21 November 2025 under CENTRAL-SOCIAL-SECURITY and the applicable Central, State or Union Territory rules and notifications.

sources.name: Ministry of Labour & Employment Labour Codes Portal
sources.authority: Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India

sources.name: India Code
sources.authority: Legislative Department, Ministry of Law and Justice, Government of India

governance.changeSummary: Updated the Payment of Gratuity Act record as a superseded historical record, preserved the existing definitions and rule identifiers, documented repeal-and-savings treatment, and linked current gratuity compliance to the Code on Social Security, 2020 from 21 November 2025.
